allow: Bash(python3 -c "import json,sys; ports=json.load\(sys.stdin\); [print\(p.get\('interface','?'\), '| pvid=', p.get\('pvid','?'\), '| frame-types=', p.get\('frame-types','?'\), '| bridge=', p.get\('bridge','?'\), '| status=', p.get\('status','?'\)\) for p in ports]")

Bash(ssh -o StrictHostKeyChecking=no -o ConnectTimeout=5 root@192.168.0.53 'for i in $\(seq 1 254\); do \(timeout 1 bash -c "</dev/tcp/192.168.0.$i/8006" 2>/dev/null && echo "8006 OPEN: 192.168.0.$i"\) & done; wait')
Bash(ssh -o StrictHostKeyChecking=no -o ConnectTimeout=10 hummes1@192.168.0.53 'echo OK; ip a | head -20')

Bash(ssh -o StrictHostKeyChecking=no svenlito@192.168.0.53 'sudo systemctl status meshcentral.service --no-pager | head -20; echo ---; sudo docker ps --format "table {{.Names}}\\t{{.Status}}\\t{{.Ports}}"; echo ---; sudo docker logs meshcentral 2>&1 | tail -25')
Bash(ssh -o StrictHostKeyChecking=no svenlito@192.168.0.53 'sudo docker compose -f /opt/meshcentral/docker-compose.yml down && sudo rm -rf /opt/meshcentral/data/* /opt/meshcentral/web/*')

Bash(ssh -o StrictHostKeyChecking=no svenlito@192.168.0.53 'sudo cat /opt/meshcentral/docker-compose.yml | grep HOSTNAME; echo ---; sudo docker compose -f /opt/meshcentral/docker-compose.yml up -d 2>&1 | tail -5; sleep 8; echo ---; sudo docker logs meshcentral 2>&1 | tail -10')
Bash(ssh -o StrictHostKeyChecking=no svenlito@192.168.0.53 'sleep 30; sudo docker logs meshcentral 2>&1 | tail -15')

Bash(ssh -o StrictHostKeyChecking=no svenlito@192.168.0.53 'echo "=== from pi-hole host ==="; ping -c 2 -W 2 10.10.1.10; echo; echo "=== from meshcentral container ==="; sudo docker exec meshcentral sh -c "ping -c 2 -W 2 10.10.1.10 2>&1 || \(apt-get install -y iputils-ping >/dev/null 2>&1 && ping -c 2 -W 2 10.10.1.10\) || nc -zv 10.10.1.10 16992 -w 2; nc -zv 10.10.1.10 16993 -w 2"')

Bash(ssh -o StrictHostKeyChecking=no svenlito@192.168.0.53 'sudo docker exec meshcentral sh -c "node -e \\"const net=require\(\\\\\\"net\\\\\\"\);[16992,16993].forEach\(p=>{const s=new net.Socket\(\);s.setTimeout\(2000\);s.on\(\\\\\\"connect\\\\\\",\(\)=>{console.log\(\\\\\\"OK \\\\\\"+p\);s.destroy\(\)}\);s.on\(\\\\\\"timeout\\\\\\",\(\)=>{console.log\(\\\\\\"TIMEOUT \\\\\\"+p\);s.destroy\(\)}\);s.on\(\\\\\\"error\\\\\\",e=>console.log\(\\\\\\"ERR \\\\\\"+p+\\\\\\" \\\\\\"+e.code\)\);s.connect\(p,\\\\\\"10.10.1.10\\\\\\"\)}\);\\""')
Bash(ssh -o StrictHostKeyChecking=no svenlito@192.168.0.53 'sudo docker logs meshcentral 2>&1 | tail -30')

Bash(ssh svenlito@192.168.0.53 'sudo ls -la /opt/meshcentral/data/; echo ---; sudo find /opt/meshcentral/data -name "*.db" -exec ls -la {} \\;; echo ---logs---; sudo docker logs meshcentral 2>&1 | tail -40')
Bash(ssh svenlito@192.168.0.53 'sudo docker exec meshcentral node -e " *)
Bash(ssh svenlito@192.168.0.53 'sudo docker exec meshcentral find / -name "meshcmd*" -type f 2>/dev/null | head -10')
Bash(ssh svenlito@192.168.0.53 'sudo docker exec meshcentral sh -c "cd /opt/meshcentral/node_modules/meshcentral/agents && npm install http-headers 2>&1 | tail -3"')
